ABSORB FIRST. ACHE NEVER.

Flat, thin soles bottom out and pass every impact straight up into your heel, arch, knees and lower back. [vrsn] catches it first.

  • It absorbs the impact

    A dual-density midsole soaks up the force of each step before it travels up.

  • It spreads the pressure

    The wide toe box shares the load across your whole foot instead of one point.

  • Your feet finish fresh

    Heels and arches stop burning by noon. Hour twelve feels like hour one.

Questions, answered

Do they run true to size?

Yes, with a roomier toe box than most sneakers. If you are between sizes, take the next size up. Size exchanges are free within 100 days.

Will they fit wide feet?

That is what they are built for. The wide toe box is standard on v2.0, so toes splay naturally instead of getting pinched.

What is the free insole?

Every box includes the podiatrist-designed Pain Relief Insole, a $39 value, with a soft-contoured footbed that takes pressure off your heel.

Can I really machine wash them?

Yes. Gentle cycle, cold water, air dry. The knit upper comes out looking new.

How does the 100-Day At-Home Trial work?

Wear them for up to 100 days, at work, at home, anywhere. If they are not the most comfortable shoes you own, send them back for a full refund. Returns are free.

When will my order arrive?

Orders process in 1 to 2 business days and arrive 5 to 9 business days later. Shipping is free over $100.
